name: python3-aiohttp-security
title: python3-aiohttp-security
summary: provides identity and authorization for aiohttp.web
description:
provides identity and authorization for aiohttp.web
aiohttp-security is a set of public API functions as well as a reference
standard for implementation details for securing access to assets served
by a wsgi server.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-aiohttp-security because provides identity and authorization for aiohttp.web.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-aiohttp-security as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-aiohttp-security with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-aiohttp-security --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
